pkgmetadata.longdescription: Pastel Bring colors to your terminalPastel is a simple library to help you colorize strings in your terminal.It comes bundled with predefined styles info green comment yellow question black on cyan error white on red.. image httpsraw.githubusercontent.comsdispaterpastelmasterassetsscreenshot.pngFeatures Use predefined styles or add you own. Disable colors all together by calling with_colors(False). Automatically disables colors if the output is not a TTY. Used in cleo httpsgithub.comsdispatercleo_. Supports Python 2.7+, 3.5+ and PyPy.Usage.. code-block python import pastel print(pastel.colorize(infoInformationinfo)) Information Green string by default print(pastel.colorize(fgredoptionsboldThis is bold red)) This is bold redInstallation.. code-block pip install pastel
